zh.lifeSummary: 當James Fleming 7th Baron Slane於1440年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾時，他的父親Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis"31歲，母親Janetta Rochfort28歲。他於1467年與Elizabeth Welles結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年3月28日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Fleming 7th Baron Slane于1440年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾时，他的父亲Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis"31岁，母亲Janetta Rochfort28岁。他于1467年与Elizabeth Welles结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1492年3月28日在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Fleming 7th Baron Slane was born in 1440, in Newcastle, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis", was 31 and his mother, Janetta Rochfort, was 28. He married Elizabeth Welles in 1467. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 March 1492, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Fleming 7th Baron Slane est né en 1440, à Newcastle, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis", avait 31 ans et sa mère, Janetta Rochfort, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Welles en 1467. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1492, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Fleming 7th Baron Slane 1440 in Newcastle, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis" 31 und seine Mutter Janetta Rochfort 28. Er hat 1467 Elizabeth Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. März 1492 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Fleming 7th Baron Slane è nato il nel 1440 nel Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis", aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Janetta Rochfort, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Welles nel 1467. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 marzo 1492, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Fleming 7th Baron Slaneが1440年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスニューカストルで生まれた時，父Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis"は31歳，母Janetta Rochfortは28歳であった。1467年にElizabeth Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年3月28日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Fleming 7th Baron Slane(이)가 1440년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 뉴카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis"(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Janetta Rochfort(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1467년 Elizabeth Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 3월 28일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Fleming 7th Baron Slane nasceu em 1440, em Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis", tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Janetta Rochfort, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Welles em 1467. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1492, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Fleming 7th Baron Slane родился в 1440 г. в местности нюкастл, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis" было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Janetta Rochfort, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Welles в 1467 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 марта 1492 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Fleming 7th Baron Slane nació en 1440, en Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Lord William Fleming "Flandrensis", tenía 31 años y su mamá, Janetta Rochfort, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Welles en 1467. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1492, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
